sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1 / 2-4-2 / 1-2-1 coefficients normalized by 16.
sub_modules.unsharp_difference: Combinational pointwise high-frequency computation original minus blurred.
sub_modules.unsharp_gain: Combinational pointwise signed scaling of the high-frequency component by the gain input.
sub_modules.unsharp_reconstruct: Combinational pointwise reconstruction and saturation to the PIXEL_W output range.
